_meta.produced_by: stock-quant PRODUCTION path: ArbiterAgent.evaluate_eod -> KBSink.deliver -> KBClient.write_entry (the EXACT path stock #345 reports against). Idempotency-Key + body captured via spy on KBClient.write_entry; independent curl re-issued with the same idem+body to capture response verbatim.
_meta.serialization: on-wire = json.dumps(entry, ensure_ascii=False, allow_nan=False, separators=(',', ':')); httpx default JSON encoder used by KBClient.write_entry (kb/client.py:825)

auth_sanity_check.note: X-API-Key authenticates fine (healthz 200). Failure on /v1/entries is NOT 401.

schema_log_last5: 9d43b2f 2026-04-29 14:51:27 +0800 feat: absorb quant review (regex / import summary / filter docs / risk_check / metric units)
contracts.since_2026_05_15: Contracts repo last touched schemas/entry.json on 2026-04-29 (commit 9d43b2f); no quant-side pull of newer contracts since 2026-05-15. Vendored file is identical to the version under which M0 L4+L5 closed.

payload.reason: R1 (+0.750, conf=0.78) and R2 (paradigm=0.700, conf=0.72) agree; R4 calm (risk=0.40). Conviction=0.651 (CA-3 mult=1.000).

prod_vs_l4_fixture_divergence.note: DIVERGENCE FOUND. Prod adds 'confidence' (hoisted from Decision.conviction per ADR-0013); L4 fixture omits it. Prod entities = ['Decision:{sym}', 'arbiter_decisions'] (per ADR-0023/0013-amend 2026-05-19); L4 fixture entities = ['{sym}']. Prod 'payload' is Decision.to_kb_entry_payload() (rich Decision shape: direction/conviction/horizon_bucket/position_size_recommendation/systemic_risk_ceiling/evidence_refs/llm_path_used/llm_cost_usd/conflict_detected/conflict_resolved_by/reason/decision_id/red_team_dissent_id/replay_snapshot_ref); L4 fixture payload is a much simpler {action, symbol, size_pct, horizon, candidate_signal_ids, arbitration} shape — an old M0-era ad-hoc shape that predates ADR-0013. THE L4 FIXTURE HAS NOT BEEN UPDATED TO REFLECT THE DECISION CONTRACT POST-ADR-0013. Whether the L4 fixture should be updated to mirror ADR-0013 is itself a routing question; for the purposes of the 400, the prod path is the authoritative shape under test.
